brief.conclusion: 阿里云发布了Qwen-Agent，一个基于Qwen>=3.0的代理框架和应用程序。
brief.why_hot: 为开发者提供了更强大的AI应用开发工具，推动了AI技术的应用普及。

brief.conclusion: 微软推出HVE-Core，一个精心挑选的超高速工程组件集合。
brief.why_hot: 这标志着企业级自动化解决方案的一个重要进展，简化了复杂任务处理。

brief.conclusion: OpenAI发布Skills Catalog for Codex，帮助开发者更容易地使用Codex技能。
brief.why_hot: 降低了开发者利用AI进行编程的门槛，促进了AI在软件开发中的集成。

brief.conclusion: moeru-ai/airi项目新增2562星标，成为今日GitHub Trending新上榜项目。
brief.why_hot: 该项目提供了一个自我托管的Grok伴侣，展示了AI伙伴领域的创新趋势。

brief.conclusion: CyberStrikeAI项目获得106个新增星标，是一个用Go语言构建的安全测试平台。
brief.why_hot: 随着网络安全需求的增长，这类专注于AI驱动安全检测的工具变得越来越重要。

brief.conclusion: 加入Alpha Waitlist可提前体验来自Parallel Markets的新功能。
brief.why_hot: 对于希望探索Web3领域最新技术和产品的用户来说是个不错的机会。

brief.conclusion: Sigma Browser正在发放价值$200的空投活动。
brief.why_hot: 此类活动有助于吸引新用户并增加社区参与度。

github_trending.name: moeru-ai/airi
github_trending.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

github_trending.name: QwenLM/Qwen-Agent
github_trending.description: Agent framework and applications built upon Qwen>=3.0, featuring Function Calling, MCP, Code Interpreter, RAG, Chrome extension, etc.

github_trending.name: microsoft/hve-core
github_trending.description: A refined collection of Hypervelocity Engineering components (instructions, prompts, agents) to start your project off right, or upgrade your existing projects to get the most out of all Copilots

github_trending.name: Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
github_trending.description: CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.

github_trending.name: inclusionAI/AReaL
github_trending.description: Lightning-Fast RL for LLM Reasoning and Agents. Made Simple & Flexible.

github_trending.name: lingfengQAQ/webnovel-writer

github_trending.name: TheCraigHewitt/seomachine
github_trending.description: A specialized Claude Code workspace for creating long-form, SEO-optimized blog content for any business. This system helps you research, write, analyze, and optimize content that ranks well and serves your target audience.

github_trending.name: aidenybai/react-grab
